title: 基本フリータイムっしょ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, look who it is. Hi, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a chance encounter! I guess this means
you're coming along with us, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wait, seriously?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Jordan and her trainer, totally vibing together.
It's straight-up fate, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: No worries! It's all chill! Anyway, let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not understanding half of what they're talking
about, I find myself whisked away by the two of
them.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do Turf as Nails next!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wahey! Here comes Jordan's regular number!
Come on, Trainer! Let's get this party lit!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey! What was that? You call that getting hyped?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Should we turn up the volume? Let's blow it up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios turns up the music so loud that the
whole room feels like it's vibrating!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, take it easy! Turn it up for your own songs!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Here, you're on the maracas, Trainer! Or would
you rather have a mic? Just take them both!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've found myself in quite the situation...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I really vibed with that song! ♪ I'm gonna
go refill my drin—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What's up with you? Out of gas?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Cheer up! Come on, sing something!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah. We'll be here listening!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been feeling pretty overwhelmed so far, but
this might be a chance to get my footing.
choice_data_list: Go for a song that touches their hearts.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, I don't know this song. Do you, Helios?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Nope. Maybe it's, like, an oldie? But I'm gonna
bang along on the tambourine anyway. You
wanna get on the maracas?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Nah, I'm just gonna listen.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... I don't know that song at all, but you
were surprisingly good.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So is this what you'd call "chill vibes" or
something?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Not bad, right? Trainer, what's that song
called?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that Tosen Jordan has started to view
me in a slightly better light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I want a song that the girls will know and get
excited for, I've got just the one!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hold up! This is that one song! From the
video!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh, for reals?! You're doing that one?!

text_block_list.name: Jordan and Helios
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahaha! You even know all the
choreography?! Seriously? You're really doing it!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Woohoooo! ☆ Jordan, your trainer is hilarious! I'm dead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sing and dance my heart out while the girls clap
along!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... I laughed so hard, I bet I've got a six pack
now.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: A six pack? I've got a sixty pack!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Gross! That's too much... Oh man, that sent me. I
can't laugh anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My desperate attempt to win them over seems to
have been a big success.
